title: Starry GUI and Hotbar ✨
description: easy-on-the-eyes GUI pack that changes menus to be purple and starry!
body:
(finally) some mod support for this pack: [Starry GUI/Hotbar Extra Additions](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/starry-guihotbar-extra-additions)

-----------
Bring the stars closer to your Minecraft game with this cute starry GUI pack! Changes all inventories, menus and your hotbar to be in shades of purple with a few little stars sprinkled in!

**1.21.6+ NOTE: there are no locator bar textures. i do not play enough multiplayer. i will not be adding them. sorry.**

-----------
How to download:
1. Click 'download texture pack'.
2. Go to your download folder, and copy/cut the zip.
3. Locate your .minecraft resource pack folder, and paste it in.
4. Reload your Minecraft resource packs, and you'll be able to use it!

-> Please put this pack above all others in your resource pack menu, or else it will not work. If you need help, DM aelianix on discord or find me elsewhere at https://aelianix.carrd.co! <-
